structure_flags.label: proposal
structure_flags.one_line: The file is still the Stage -1 skeleton: title, locked parameters, abstract, introduction, setup, assumptions, main results, sanity check, proof sketch, scope flags, and iteration trail are TODOs rather than proposal content.

structure_flags.label: Related work
structure_flags.one_line: Section 5 contains zero published citations and no one-sentence relevance commentary.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter handoff omitted the literature checklist and Section 5 is empty; obvious verified threats include Athey-Imbens 2006, Callaway-Li 2019, Callaway-Li-Oka 2017, and D'Haultfoeuille-Hoderlein-Sasaki 2023.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: The comparator_promise_table is missing from the handoff, which is mandatory under SC6, so comparator promises cannot be audited.

novelty_flags.label: Main results
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=not-publishable below novelty_target=flagship; Section 8 states no Theorem or Conjecture and names no operational quantity such as a threshold, index, formula, or estimator frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked-parameter block is empty, so the anchor cluster, treatment, target estimand, assumptions, and convention are undefined.

soundness_flags.label: Main results
soundness_flags.one_line: There is no mathematical statement to check for well-posedness, corollaries, or prior-art overlap.

soundness_flags.label: Proof-sketch route
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 10 is still a TODO and names no classical theorem, algebraic identity, or boundary calculation.

soundness_flags.label: proposal
soundness_flags.one_line: Because setup, assumptions, and main results are empty, the hypotheses and notation cannot be matched across Sections 6-8.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the skeleton with a real proposal containing at least one labelled Conjecture or Theorem, an explicit locked-parameter block, and a named operational object for the flagship claim.

Add a location-anchored literature checklist covering nonlinear DID and quantile DID, at minimum Athey-Imbens 2006, Callaway-Li 2019, Callaway-Li-Oka 2017, and any continuous/staggered quantile DID comparator relevant to the final kernel.
Phrase the flagship result as a strict non-equivalence or iff frontier against named published estimators/identification strategies, with a concrete sanity reduction and proof route.

recommended_next_step: Return to Stage -1 drafting; this file is an unfilled skeleton, not yet a reviewable proposal.
